ads.author: Dave Owens
ads.title: Swimways Coop SCATTER DODGEBALL Fun Dodgeball Game Set # 34701 - New
ads.description: A Scatter Dodgeball game set (Swimways/Coop, # 34701). The game set is new and still contained in the original packaging. The packaging does show some (see photos), but it doesn't affect the game components. A great game to add to your collection or to just play and enjoy. About the game... Each player begins with two same-colored wristbands. And the beginning of each round, players form a circle around the dodgeball and one player rolls the dice. Any player who is wearing a wristband that matches the color on the side of the dice when the dice comes to rest may pick up the dodgeball while the other players scatter. If player throwing the dodgeball throws and hits another player, that player has to give the thrower one of their wristbands. If player throws the dodgeball and another player catches it, then player throwing has to give one wristband to the player who caught the ball. First player to collect all the wristbands wins. Game includes: One sting-proof dodgeball. One colored foam dice. Twelve colored wristbands (6 colors). Game rules.

ads.author: John Olsen
ads.title: Authentic Japanese “Kariyushi Okinawa Special Version” pachislo machine manufactured by Takasago
ads.description: Comes with 500 shiny perfectly minted Japanese game tokens (Execute a deep dive and with a few basic mods, convert this Amazingly rare perfectly working machine to accept quarters. This is a genuine Japanese casino-style pachislo cabinet — not a toy replica or modern imitation. Beautifully illuminated with strong audio, animated reel action, and classic Japanese arcade/casino aesthetics. Machine features: * Working reel system * Illuminated bonus display * Skill-stop gameplay * Original internal electronics * Hopper/token system * Integrated speakers and sound * Japanese artwork and Okinawa-themed cabinet * Factory Takasago hardware and boards * Home-use converted setup Condition is exceptionally clean for its age and presents beautifully when powered on. Perfect for: * game rooms * theater rooms * arcade collections * man caves * RV lounge setups * collector displays Heavy commercial-grade steel cabinet construction. Approximate weight: 75–90 lbs. Local pickup only. For collectible/home entertainment purposes only. * “collector pachislo” * “Japanese arcade machine” * “home entertainment machine”

ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.
